entryCriteria.formula: OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Specialist') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Arbitration Manager Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Manager - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Arbitration Coordinator Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 1500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Operation Head') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'FCA Manager') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Senior Manager') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ))

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 1500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 1500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Operation Head') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Specialist') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Arbitration Manager Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Manager - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Arbitration Coordinator Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'FCA Manager') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ))

approvalStep.description: Assign to Manager of Manager of Manager

entryCriteria.formula: OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Specialist') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Arbitration Coordinator Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Manager - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Operation Head') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) )

approvalStep.label: Level 3
approvalStep.name: Step_3

entryCriteria.formula: OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Specialist') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) )

ApprovalProcess.description: Approval Process created for CC-544 for Canada. This is valid only for Check Requests created for Owner for some conditions are otherwise depending on other conditions.
ApprovalProcess.label: Canada Check Approval Process For Owner
